intent.description: Rewrite Chinese AI or tech 文章、新闻素材、article titles, article drafts, and source material into 新智元-style headline options for Qiaomu workflows. Use this skill when the user asks for 新智元版标题, 新智元风格起标题, 微信公众号爆款标题改写, or to convert an article/title into a high-density AI media headline while preserving facts.
intent.job_to_be_done: Turn user-provided AI/tech articles, news source material, article drafts, or existing titles into 新智元-style Chinese headline options while preserving source facts.

qiaomu_defaults.style: 新智元式 AI 媒体标题

should_trigger: 把这篇 AI 文章改成新智元版标题
用 qiaomu-xinzhiyuan-title 给这个稿子起 5 个标题
这个文章标题不够新智元，帮我改一下
这条 AI 新闻要发公众号，起一个新智元风格标题
Use $qiaomu-xinzhiyuan-title to rewrite this AI article headline
should_not_trigger: 总结这篇新智元文章内容，不改标题
帮我写一个学术论文标题，克制一点
给这篇文章起一个乔木博客标题，不要新智元风格
只翻译这个标题成英文
near_neighbor: 分析新智元公众号的选题策略，不要改标题
把标题改成36氪风格，不是新智元
写一个通用微信公众号标题，不要标题党

router_rules: Trigger for 新智元版标题, 新智元风格起标题, 公众号爆款标题改写, or explicit qiaomu-xinzhiyuan-title requests.
Do not trigger for summaries, translations, academic titles, Qiaomu blog titles, or other media styles when the user says not to use 新智元.
Always preserve facts and mark unsupported freshness, ranking, authority, money, benchmark, or named-person claims.
compact_workflow: Extract core entity, action, hard hooks, authority, stakes, and affected group from the input.
Choose one primary angle: major AI entity, hard number, conflict/reversal, authority/ranking, China/global frame, or user consequence.
Generate 5-7 candidates across recommended, number-heavy, conflict, authority, question, and restrained versions.
Score candidates against length, entity, number, action, consequence, punctuation, quoted concept, and source-required claim checks.
Return recommended title first, alternatives second, then style basis and fact boundary.
gate_ladder: Scaffold: SKILL.md frontmatter, README hook, clear exclusions.
Production: interface.yaml, trigger_cases.json, source-analysis reference, score_title.py, trigger eval report.
Library: skill-ir.json, portability notes, trust boundary.
Governed: not selected; no account, credential, publication, or external action.
output_contract: Default output: 推荐标题, 3+备选, 风格依据, 事实边界.
When the user requests one title, output one 推荐标题 and a short fact-boundary note if needed.
Do not invent unsupported facts; prefer restrained version when source stakes are weak.

permissions.interactive: avoid unless the source facts are insufficient and the user asks for factual claims

scaffold: README hook and natural trigger examples
governed: not selected; no account, credential, or publication action

evidence_boundary.public_claim_policy: claim only what local validation, install proof, human review, or provider-backed evidence actually supports
